name: Tex-Mex Chicken Roll
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the mayonnaise and cilantro in a small bowl.
2. Mix the chicken with salsa in another small bowl.
3. Spread 2 tablespoons of the mayonnaise mixture on one side of each tortilla.
4. Top each tortilla, within 1 inch from the edge, with half a cup of lettuce, half a cup of chicken mixture, half a cup of diced pepper, and 2 tablespoons of chopped onion.
5. Starting at the edge nearest you, tightly roll up the tortilla.
6. Wrap the rolled tortilla tightly in plastic wrap.
7. Refrigerate for up to 2 days.
8. Cut each rolled tortilla into 2-3 pieces to serve.
